name: Sissy Squat
setup: Stand with back to anchor point or use sissy squat bench
execution: Lean back while keeping body in straight line from knees to head
Lower torso toward floor, knees bend forward
Go until quads feel maximal stretch or can't hold form
Reverse by pulling torso back up using quads
cues: Keep body in straight plank from knees to head
Stretch the quads at the bottom
